name: No Insurance Employer Accident Centerville

mainEntity.name: What if employer no insurance Centerville UT accident?
mainEntity.text: What if employer no insurance Centerville UT accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah Uninsured Employer Fund covers claims hold employer liable personally.[17]

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville no-insurance on-the-job injuries access state fund after proving noncompliance. Sue employer directly for negligence beyond comp. Fund limits apply—attorney pursues all avenues maximizes recovery.[17]

description: Utah Uninsured Employer Fund covers claims hold employer liable personally.[17]
